title: Marbella Dolphin Watching: Romantic Boat Hire Tips 2026
html:
Marbella offers a sublime setting for dolphin watching on a romantic boat hire, with departures from Puerto Banús and prices starting around 55 OMR per couple for a shared tour. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

A shared dolphin-watching tour from Puerto Banús costs about 55 OMR per person. Private half-day motorboat rentals start at 120 OMR, while a full-day catamaran for up to 12 guests can be 350 OMR. Crewed yachts range from 600 OMR upwards for a luxury experience. You can browse boats for your dates to compare verified listings.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella has several excellent departure points for dolphin-watching cruises. Puerto Banús is the most famous marina, lined with glamorous yachts and waterfront restaurants. The Real Club Náutico de Marbella sits next to the Old Town and offers direct access to the bay. Cabopino Marina, east of Marbella, provides a quieter launch spot close to the Artola dunes.

The Mar Menor lagoon near La Manga is not in Marbella, but the Mediterranean Sea off Marbella's coast is rich with marine life. Estepona, just west of Marbella, also offers dolphin tours from its harbour. The Isle of Alborán lies about 35 nautical miles south, a protected reserve where dolphins frequently gather.

Which boat to rent in Marbella

  1. Motor Yacht (e.g. Princess V58), Ideal for a romantic day trip with a master cabin; sleeps 6 comfortably; from 500 OMR half-day.
  2. Sailing Yacht (e.g. Sun Odyssey 49), Great for a quiet, wind-blown excursion; capacity 8 guests; from 300 OMR half-day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 50), Spacious deck for dolphin spotting; up to 12 guests; from 450 OMR full-day.
  4. RIB (e.g. Axopar 37), Fast and nimble for chasing dolphin pods; maximum 10 guests; from 200 OMR for 4 hours.

The Princess V58 is a popular choice for couples; you can see this motor yacht on BoatHire24 for full details. All vessels include a captain and safety equipment.

When is the best season for dolphin watching in Marbella?

Visit between May and September for calm seas and the highest dolphin sightings, but avoid August if you dislike crowded anchorages; the morning Levante wind can bring choppy conditions in the afternoon.

The peak season runs from June to August, with daytime temperatures averaging 30°C. BoatHire24 recommends booking well in advance for these months. In spring and autumn, the water remains warm enough for swimming, and dolphin sightings are still frequent. For licence requirements, the operator will confirm whether a bareboat rental is possible, but most hire boats come with a skipper.

Cost breakdown for boat hire in Marbella

  • Shared dolphin-watching tour (3 hours): from 55 OMR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, private): 120, 250 OMR total
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, up to 12 guests): 350, 700 OMR
  • Luxury crewed yacht (full-day, champagne and canapés): 600, 1,200 OMR

At a glance

  • Price range: 55, 1,200 OMR per trip
  • Peak season: June to August 2026
  • Typical trip length: 3, 8 hours
  • Maximum capacity: up to 12 guests on most boats
  • Currency: OMR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Marbella?

Most rental companies in Marbella provide a licensed skipper with the boat, so no personal licence is required.

What time of day is best for dolphin watching?

Morning departures, around 10 am, often yield the calmest seas and most active dolphin sightings.

Are the tours suitable for children?

Yes, boat hire in Marbella for dolphin watching is family-friendly, with life vests provided for all ages.

How far offshore do the boats go?

Dolphin-watching trips typically cruise 2, 5 nautical miles offshore to reach feeding grounds.

Whether you are visiting for a honeymoon or a special anniversary, boat hire in Marbella offers an unforgettable experience. To book your perfect vessel, browse the listings on BoatHire24, where owners can also list their boats for hire.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
